creator: lbartoletti@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 215854
sysutils/opensbi: Udpateo to 0.8

sysutils/opensbi: Update to 0.8

 - QEMU/virt and SPIKE are merged in GENERIC
 - Add ANDES_AE350, NUCLEI_UX600, THEAD_C910, FPGA_ARIANE and FPGA_OPENPITON options [1]
 - Fix installation paths


Test plan:
 - All options tested

[1] ATM, I have a problem with KENDRYTE_K210 but I didn't try to solve it since I focus mainly on QEMU in order to update the FreeBSD and RiscV wiki page.
